question: Will I qualify for at least one international olympiad?
reason: Your strong qualifications and experience suggest a moderate chance of qualifying for at least one international Olympiad.
evidence: Qualified once in 2023-24 and made final selection three times over the past two years.
1600 SAT score places you in the top 0.02% of all participants.
Competition pools range from 1,500 to 4,000 participants, with 8 selected per Olympiad.
